title: 第六次课-列表与数据框的操作

yaml.title: 第六次课-列表与数据框的操作

markdown.markdown:
```{css, echo=FALSE} .watch-out { background-color: darkviolet; border: 3px solid greenyellow; font-weight: bold; } ```
do.call () executes any function by its name's when a list of the corresponding argument is passed ```{r list1, echo = TRUE,prompt=FALSE,background="badCode"} list1 <- list(c(1, 2, 3), c(7, 5, 10), c(9, 9, 2)) #sum(list1) error do.call(sum, list1) do.call(sum, list1[1:2]) #do.call(mean,list1) df1 <- data.frame(team=c('A', 'B', 'C'), points=c(22, 27, 38)) df2 <- data.frame(team=c('D', 'E', 'F'), points=c(22, 14, 20)) df3 <- data.frame(team=c('G', 'H', 'I'), points=c(11, 15, 18)) #place three data frames into list df_list <- list(df1, df2, df3) do.call(rbind, df_list) ``` # apply家族函数（单一数据结构的贯穿式操作） -- apply(x, MARGIN, FUN, ...) x：数组或矩阵 MARGIN：取一个介于1到2之间的值或范围，以定义该函数的应用位置： -MARGIN = 1：对行执行操作 -MARGIN = 2：对列执行操作 -MARGIN = c（1,2）该操作在行和列上执行 -FUN：告诉应用哪个功能。可以应用平均值，中位数，和，最小值，最大值甚至用户定义的函数等内置函数 --lapply(X, FUN) Arguments: -X: A vector or an object -FUN: Function applied to each element of x -- sapply(X, FUN, ..., simplify = TRUE, USE.NAMES = TRUE) -- tapply(X, INDEX, FUN = NULL) Arguments: -- mapply(FUN, ..., MoreArgs = NULL, SIMPLIFY = TRUE, USE.NAMES = TRUE) 直接上代码解释 ```{r list2, echo = TRUE,prompt=FALSE,background="badCode"} X<-matrix(rnorm(30), nrow=5, ncol=6) apply(X,1 ,sum)#row sum apply(X, 2, sort) apply(X, 2, is.vector) A<-matrix(1:9, 3,3) B<-matrix(4:15, 4,3) C<-matrix(8:10, 3,2) MyList<-list(A,B,C) # display the list lapply(MyList,"[", , 2)# [,2] lapply(MyList,"[", 1, )# [1,] sapply(MyList,"[", 2,1)# 向量化结果 movies <- c("SPYDERMAN","BATMAN","VERTIGO","CHINATOWN") lapply(movies, tolower) sapply(cars, min) tapply(iris$Sepal.Width, iris$Species, median) A = list(c(1, 2, 3, 4)) B = list(c(2, 5, 1, 6)) mapply(sum, A, B) mapply(rep,1:4,4:1) ``` # sweep函数（两个数据结构的对应操作） 数据标准化为例： $x_{std}=\frac{x-\bar{x}}{x_{sd}}$ ```{r sweep, echo = TRUE,prompt=FALSE,background="badCode"} df <- iris[,1:4] col.mean <- apply(df,2,mean) col.sd <- apply(df,2,sd) df.mean.sub <- sweep(df,2,col.mean,"-") df.std <- sweep(df.mean.sub,2,col.sd,"/") apply(df.std,2,sum) .Machine$double.eps #the smallest positive floating-point number ``` # aggregate 函数(分类汇总) ```{r aggregate, echo = TRUE,prompt=FALSE,background="badCode"} aggregate(mtcars[,1],list(mtcars$am,mtcars$cyl),mean) aggregate(mpg~am*cyl,data = mtcars,mean) aggregate(. ~ Species, data = iris, mean) ag <- aggregate(len ~ ., data = ToothGrowth, mean) xtabs(len ~ ., data = ag) ``` # map函数家族 The map() function from the purrr package in R can be used to apply some function to each element in a vector or list and return a list as a result. ```{r map, echo = TRUE,prompt=FALSE,background="badCode"} library(purrr) data <- list(1L, "a", FALSE) map(data, typeof) list.A <- list(c(1, 2, 3), c(4, 5, 6), c(7, 8, NA)) map(list.A, sum,na.rm=TRUE) map(iris[,1:4],mean) map(1:3,rnorm,n=5) map(1:3,function(x) rnorm(5, x)) map(1:3,~rnorm(5, .x)) l2 <- list( list(num = 1:3, letters[1:3]), list(num = 101:103, letters[4:6]), list() ) map(l2,c(2, 2)) ``` # R数据变形的有力工具 ![图6-1：reshape包中melt和cast函数的用法示意图](H:/上课材料/R语言编程基础/R 语言第二次2021年春夏/material figures/reshaping.png){ width=80% }

```{css, echo=FALSE} .watch-out { background-color: darkviolet; border: 3px solid greenyellow; font-weight: bold; } ```
# do.call 函数（列表的操作） do.call () executes any function by its name's when a list of the corresponding argument is passed ```{r list1, echo = TRUE,prompt=FALSE,background="badCode"} list1 <- list(c(1, 2, 3), c(7, 5, 10), c(9, 9, 2)) #sum(list1) error do.call(sum, list1) do.call(sum, list1[1:2]) #do.call(mean,list1) df1 <- data.frame(team=c('A', 'B', 'C'), points=c(22, 27, 38)) df2 <- data.frame(team=c('D', 'E', 'F'), points=c(22, 14, 20)) df3 <- data.frame(team=c('G', 'H', 'I'), points=c(11, 15, 18)) #place three data frames into list df_list <- list(df1, df2, df3) do.call(rbind, df_list) ``` # apply家族函数（单一数据结构的贯穿式操作） -- apply(x, MARGIN, FUN, ...) x：数组或矩阵 MARGIN：取一个介于1到2之间的值或范围，以定义该函数的应用位置： -MARGIN = 1：对行执行操作 -MARGIN = 2：对列执行操作 -MARGIN = c（1,2）该操作在行和列上执行 -FUN：告诉应用哪个功能。可以应用平均值，中位数，和，最小值，最大值甚至用户定义的函数等内置函数 --lapply(X, FUN) Arguments: -X: A vector or an object -FUN: Function applied to each element of x -- sapply(X, FUN, ..., simplify = TRUE, USE.NAMES = TRUE) -- tapply(X, INDEX, FUN = NULL) Arguments: -- mapply(FUN, ..., MoreArgs = NULL, SIMPLIFY = TRUE, USE.NAMES = TRUE) 直接上代码解释 ```{r list2, echo = TRUE,prompt=FALSE,background="badCode"} X<-matrix(rnorm(30), nrow=5, ncol=6) apply(X,1 ,sum)#row sum apply(X, 2, sort) apply(X, 2, is.vector) A<-matrix(1:9, 3,3) B<-matrix(4:15, 4,3) C<-matrix(8:10, 3,2) MyList<-list(A,B,C) # display the list lapply(MyList,"[", , 2)# [,2] lapply(MyList,"[", 1, )# [1,] sapply(MyList,"[", 2,1)# 向量化结果 movies <- c("SPYDERMAN","BATMAN","VERTIGO","CHINATOWN") lapply(movies, tolower) sapply(cars, min) tapply(iris$Sepal.Width, iris$Species, median) A = list(c(1, 2, 3, 4)) B = list(c(2, 5, 1, 6)) mapply(sum, A, B) mapply(rep,1:4,4:1) ``` # sweep函数（两个数据结构的对应操作） 数据标准化为例： $x_{std}=\frac{x-\bar{x}}{x_{sd}}$ ```{r sweep, echo = TRUE,prompt=FALSE,background="badCode"} df <- iris[,1:4] col.mean <- apply(df,2,mean) col.sd <- apply(df,2,sd) df.mean.sub <- sweep(df,2,col.mean,"-") df.std <- sweep(df.mean.sub,2,col.sd,"/") apply(df.std,2,sum) .Machine$double.eps #the smallest positive floating-point number ``` # aggregate 函数(分类汇总) ```{r aggregate, echo = TRUE,prompt=FALSE,background="badCode"} aggregate(mtcars[,1],list(mtcars$am,mtcars$cyl),mean) aggregate(mpg~am*cyl,data = mtcars,mean) aggregate(. ~ Species, data = iris, mean) ag <- aggregate(len ~ ., data = ToothGrowth, mean) xtabs(len ~ ., data = ag) ``` # map函数家族 The map() function from the purrr package in R can be used to apply some function to each element in a vector or list and return a list as a result. ```{r map, echo = TRUE,prompt=FALSE,background="badCode"} library(purrr) data <- list(1L, "a", FALSE) map(data, typeof) list.A <- list(c(1, 2, 3), c(4, 5, 6), c(7, 8, NA)) map(list.A, sum,na.rm=TRUE) map(iris[,1:4],mean) map(1:3,rnorm,n=5) map(1:3,function(x) rnorm(5, x)) map(1:3,~rnorm(5, .x)) l2 <- list( list(num = 1:3, letters[1:3]), list(num = 101:103, letters[4:6]), list() ) map(l2,c(2, 2)) ``` # R数据变形的有力工具 ![图6-1：reshape包中melt和cast函数的用法示意图](H:/上课材料/R语言编程基础/R 语言第二次2021年春夏/material figures/reshaping.png){ width=80% }
